chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1406 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 14.12.2023 Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Najaf Ali Janwri, Focal Person of Municipal Committee, Khairpur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Focal Person of Municipal Committee, Khairpur has submitted a statement along with an original cheque No. 41781638 dated 06.12.2023 of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac), which shall be retained by the Accountant of this Court and would be handed over to the petitioner on the verification and identification. He further submits that remaining amount of Rs.1,24,559/- will be paid to the petitioner in next month. Apart from that, financial assistance amounting to Rs.6,00,000/- are to be paid to the petitioner, for which he has not applied yet. As soon as, he applies for the same, the process for such payments would also be initiated. In view of above, the petitioner is disposed of. However, non- payment will expose the defaulter to contempt proceedings. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
